name: Pinging Monitor
description: 24/7 ISP uptime monitor using HTTP, WebRTC UDP, and DNS tests against pinging.net. Serves a local dashboard showing RTT, packet loss, and outage history.

notes.text: WebRTC pings require outbound UDP to pinging.net:8888. If blocked by your network, HTTP pings still run.
Data is stored at /var/lib/pinging-monitor/monitor.db. To change the target server set TARGET_HOST in the systemd service.
